content: Unlike previous recurrent architectures that processed data linearly, self-attention enables the model to capture long-range dependencies and contextual relationships simultaneously across the entire input, significantly improving the representation of complex linguistic structures
summary: Unlike previous recurrent architectures that processed data linearly, self-attention enables the model to capture long-range dependencies and contextual relationships simultaneously across the entire input, significantly improving the representation of complex linguistic structures
